overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street during light rain. The player character walks along wet sidewalks past the 'Empathy' nightclub with holographic advertisements, continuing under an industrial overpass with palm tree planters.

futuristic vehicle passes by on the left side road

large concrete and yellow-trimmed building structure covering the walkway
dark futuristic building wall with yellow structural accents
yellow textured guidance strip running along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark building overhang with a pedestrian signal visible on the left. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk with yellow tactile paving, emerging from the covered area into a more open urban street. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet multi-lane road to the left as the player approaches a neon-lit district.

rain becomes visibly heavier with droplets visible in the neon light

notable_agents.action: standing near the club entrance, possibly security or patrons

horizontal blue neon lighting along the club's architectural edges

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the brightly lit 'Empathy' nightclub entrance dominated by red neon signage and a holographic human figure. NPCs stand near the entrance while rain falls on the wet sidewalk. The scene is illuminated by vibrant blue and red neon lights reflecting off the wet pavement as vehicles continue to pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial billboards approaching underpass

events.description: passing the nightclub area into a quieter street section with fewer neon lights
approaching the darker underpass area with industrial overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wet sidewalk past the large red billboard toward the underpass

plain brown concrete wall with minimal detailing

segments.scene_description: Moving past the nightclub district, the player walks along a quieter section of sidewalk with a large red billboard on the right. The environment transitions from neon-lit commercial to more industrial as the camera approaches a dark underpass structure. The rain continues to fall on the wet pavement as futuristic vehicles drive by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with industrial architecture

events.description: entering the covered underpass area with industrial support beams
passing palm trees in concrete planters under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass through the sheltered walkway with industrial structural elements

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered underpass with massive concrete support pillars and industrial overhead beams. Palm trees in planters line the center of the walkway while the road continues to the right. The area is sheltered from the rain by the overpass structure, with artificial lighting illuminating the wet concrete surfaces as the walk continues toward the distant exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban overhang through a vibrant neon district and into a stark industrial underpass. It begins beneath a dark building overhang, moving along a concrete sidewalk with yellow tactile paving as the camera emerges into an open street where futuristic vehicles glide past on wet roads. As the player advances, the environment shifts into a brightly lit commercial zone dominated by the red neon signage and holographic figures of the Empathy nightclub, with vibrant blue and red lights reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement. The scene then transitions away from the neon glow toward a quieter stretch of sidewalk marked by a large red billboard before the camera approaches a massive concrete structure. Finally, the movement leads under a sheltered overpass characterized by industrial beams and palm trees in planters, where artificial lighting illuminates the wet concrete as the path continues toward a distant exit.
